data.title: Mitchell Services Delivers Strong Q3 With Earnings Surge and Margin Expansion
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mitchell Services Limited ( (AU:MSV) ) has shared an announcement.

Mitchell Services Limited reported a strong third quarter for FY26, with quarterly EBITDA rising 110% year-on-year to $11.2 million and EBT swinging to a $5.7 million profit. Revenue increased 3.7% to $48.5 million, supported by improved weather, fewer client delays and prior-year projects moving from ramp-up to business-as-usual operations.

Year-to-date FY26 EBITDA climbed 81% to $32.6 million on modest revenue growth and slightly lower average operating rigs, lifting margins and delivering an annualised ROIC of 26.3%. The company also maintained a solid balance sheet with net debt of $0.9 million after an $8.5 million dividend, and highlighted spare fleet capacity that could provide upside if client demand for rigs strengthens.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MSV) stock is a Hold with a A$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mitchell Services Limited stock, see the AU:MSV Stock Forecast page.

More about Mitchell Services Limited

Mitchell Services Limited is an Australian-listed drilling services provider focused on the mining and resources sector. The company operates a fleet of 88 rigs, supplying drilling capacity to resource clients, with revenue driven by rig utilisation, shift volumes and project mobilisation activity across its customer base.

Average Trading Volume: 988,084

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: A$106M

data.title: Xpedra Strikes Broad Shallow Gold Zones in Maiden Drilling at Springfield
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Thunderbird Resources ( (AU:XPD) ) has issued an update.

Xpedra Resources has reported promising initial assay results from its maiden reverse circulation drilling program at the Springfield Gold Deposit in New South Wales. The first two drill holes intersected broad, shallow zones of gold mineralisation, including 36 metres at 1.84 grams per tonne from 19 metres and 10 metres at 1.28 grams per tonne from 13 metres, with multiple higher-grade intervals.

Management says the results confirm a robust mineralised system and strengthen confidence in Springfield’s potential to host a significant shallow gold deposit. A total of 27 holes for 2,579 metres have been completed, with assays pending for 25 holes over the next four to six weeks, setting the stage for expanded drilling and potentially reshaping the project’s development prospects.

More about Thunderbird Resources

Xpedra Resources Limited is an Australian gold exploration company listed on the ASX under the ticker XPD. The company is focused on advancing its Springfield Gold Deposit in the Lachlan Fold Belt of New South Wales, targeting shallow, intrusion-hosted gold mineralisation along a 1,700-metre-long mineralised corridor.

YTD Price Performance: 16.67%

Average Trading Volume: 1,712,928

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$12.1M

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Genesis Energy Limited ( (DE:1G6) ) is now available.

Genesis Energy Limited has disclosed the equity interests of newly appointed Chief Financial Officer Emma Oettli, in line with New Zealand’s Financial Markets Conduct Act. The notice details her holding of 19,940 ordinary shares in Genesis Energy and performance share rights under the company’s FY2025 and FY2026 equity incentive plans.

Oettli’s interests include two tranches of performance share rights, which entitle her to receive additional ordinary shares subject to plan conditions. The disclosure underscores Genesis Energy’s compliance with market transparency requirements and aligns executive incentives with shareholder outcomes through equity-based remuneration.

More about Genesis Energy Limited

Genesis Energy Limited is a New Zealand-based electricity and gas company listed on the NZX under ticker GNE. It operates as a gentailer, combining electricity generation with retail energy supply to residential, commercial and industrial customers, giving it a significant role in the country’s energy market and access to long-term capital through public markets.

The latest update is out from Cleanaway Waste Management ( (AU:CWY) ).

Cleanaway Waste Management has announced that it will hold an Investor Day, at which management will present a refreshed 2026 strategy briefing to the market. The presentation materials, authorised for release by the board, are intended to update investors on the company’s strategic direction and priorities as it continues to position itself as a leading sustainable waste and environmental services provider.

The Investor Day briefing signals an effort to sharpen Cleanaway’s medium‑term roadmap and communicate how its extensive asset base and regional footprint will support future growth. While specific initiatives were not detailed in the release, the event underscores the company’s focus on engaging shareholders and other stakeholders around its role in the evolving waste, recycling and industrial services landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CWY) stock is a Buy with a A$2.91 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cleanaway Waste Management stock, see the AU:CWY Stock Forecast page.

More about Cleanaway Waste Management

Cleanaway Waste Management Limited is Australia’s leading sustainable waste management, industrial and environmental services company. It operates more than 6,400 vehicles across over 350 locations in Australia, New Zealand and the Middle East, supported by recycling facilities, transfer stations, engineered landfills, liquid treatment plants and refineries.

The company employs a workforce of more than 10,000 people and partners with customers, communities, governments, regulators and industry to provide integrated waste and industrial services. Its stated purpose is to make a sustainable future possible through its broad operational network and environmental solutions platform.

Leader Education Limited ( (HK:1449) ) just unveiled an update.

Leader Education Limited has scheduled a board meeting for 30 April 2026 to review and approve the interim financial results for the six months ended 28 February 2026 for the company and its subsidiaries. data.title: Apple Announces CEO Transition to John Ternus
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Apple ( (AAPL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 20, 2026, Apple announced that Tim Cook will step down as Chief Executive Officer and become Executive Chair of the Board, effective September 1, 2026, marking a major leadership transition at the company. The Board has appointed John Ternus, currently Senior Vice President of Hardware Engineering and a long-time Apple executive since 2001, as CEO and Board member from the same date, while current Chair Art Levinson will assume the role of Lead Independent Director.

Apple highlighted Ternus’s deep experience in hardware engineering, product design, and innovation as key strengths expected to shape its future strategy and operations. The company also disclosed that Ternus has no disclosable family or related-party transactions with Apple’s leadership and will enter into Apple’s standard indemnification agreement for directors and executive officers, signaling a routine but closely watched governance shift for investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AAPL) stock is a Buy with a $315.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Apple stock, see the AAPL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AAPL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AAPL is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by exceptional profitability and cash-flow strength, reinforced by upbeat earnings-call results and guidance. Offsetting factors are balance-sheet leverage risk and a premium valuation with a low dividend yield; technicals are supportive but not strongly momentum-driven.

To see Spark’s full report on AAPL stock, click here.

More about Apple

Apple Inc. is a global technology company that designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and related software and services. The company’s flagship products, including the iPhone, Mac, iPad, and Apple Watch, along with its services ecosystem, position Apple as a leading player in the consumer electronics and digital services markets.

data.title: Kingstone Extends CEO Contract to Support Growth Strategy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Kingstone Companies ( (KINS) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 20, 2026, Kingstone Companies, Inc. announced that its Board of Directors has extended the employment agreement of President and Chief Executive Officer Meryl Golden by two years, moving the expiration date from January 10, 2027, to January 10, 2029, following a recommendation from the Compensation Committee. The Board cited Golden’s role in driving Kingstone back to record profitability and laying out a roadmap for measured expansion, including the company’s entry into California and further new-state growth plans, positioning the extension as a move to ensure leadership continuity as the company pursues its 2029 target of $500 million in direct written premium and seeks to deliver sustained value for shareholders.

Spark’s Take on KINS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KINS is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving financial performance and very attractive valuation (low P/E), supported by a constructive earnings call focused on strong underlying underwriting and growth guidance. These positives are tempered by weak technical trend signals and the fundamental risk flags highlighted in the statements (notably the sharp 2025 revenue decline and historical volatility), plus near-term catastrophe sensitivity embedded in 2026 guidance.

To see Spark’s full report on KINS stock, click here.

More about Kingstone Companies

Kingstone Companies, Inc., based in Kingston, N.Y., is a Northeast regional property and casualty insurance holding company whose principal operating subsidiary is Kingstone Insurance Company, a New York-domiciled carrier writing business through retail and wholesale agents and brokers. The company focuses on tailored homeowners insurance solutions via its Select product suite and is also licensed in New Jersey, Rhode Island, Massachusetts, Connecticut, Pennsylvania, New Hampshire, and Maine, ranking as the 11th largest homeowners insurer in New York in 2025.

Kingstone’s operating platform is designed to be scalable and efficient, supporting strategic expansion beyond its core Northeast footprint while targeting significant market opportunities. Its recent moves include entry into California, underscoring a broader diversification and growth strategy in personal lines property insurance.

Aehr Test Systems ( (AEHR) ) has provided an update.

On April 17, 2026, Aehr Test Systems completed the full use of its previously announced at-the-market equity offering program. The company sold shares of its common stock for aggregate gross proceeds of approximately $60 million, bolstering its capital base and potentially enhancing financial flexibility for ongoing operations and strategic initiatives.

The shares were issued under an effective shelf registration statement that authorized up to $100 million of securities. By utilizing this program, Aehr Test Systems accessed public equity markets in a measured manner, which may influence shareholder dilution while supporting its ability to invest in growth and maintain its competitive position in the semiconductor test equipment sector.

data.title: Turners Sets Dividend Reinvestment Plan Strike Price at NZ$8.46
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Turners Automotive Group Ltd ( (AU:TRA) ) is now available.

Turners Automotive Group has set the strike price for its Dividend Reinvestment Plan at NZ$8.46 per share for the dividend payable on 29 April 2026. The price reflects the volume-weighted average sale price of TRA shares on the NZX Main Board over the five trading days from 14 April 2026, adjusted to include a 2% discount for participating shareholders.

The DRP pricing mechanism underlines Turners’ ongoing use of equity-based capital management tools while offering investors a modest discount to market to reinvest their dividend. This move may support shareholder participation, enhance liquidity in TRA shares, and strengthen the company’s capital position without resorting to a separate capital raise.

More about Turners Automotive Group Ltd

Turners Automotive Group Limited is an NZX Top 50 integrated financial services group primarily focused on the automotive sector. The company operates across vehicle-related services and financing in New Zealand, with its shares listed on both the NZX and ASX under the ticker TRA.
